'''wavala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnodontid|pycnodontid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnodontid|pycnodontid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wavala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wævælæth|wævælæth]] || [[word:wævælæj|wævælæj]] || [[word:wævælæsh|wævælæsh]] || [[word:wævælæ|wævælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wavavalath|wavavalath]] || [[word:wavavalaj|wavavalaj]] || [[word:wavavalash|wavavalash]] || [[word:wavavala|wavavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wavalath|wavalath]] || [[word:wavalaj|wavalaj]] || [[word:wavalash|wavalash]] || [[word:wavala|wavala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wavaflath|wavaflath]] || [[word:wavaflaj|wavaflaj]] || [[word:wavaflash|wavaflash]] || [[word:wavaflaf|wavaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wavalatha|wavalatha]] || [[word:wavalaja|wavalaja]] || [[word:wavalasha|wavalasha]] || [[word:wavalaka|wavalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wavalath|wavalath]] || [[word:wavalaj|wavalaj]] || [[word:wavalash|wavalash]] || [[word:wavala|wavala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wavalathal|wavalathal]] || [[word:wavalajal|wavalajal]] || [[word:wavalashal|wavalashal]] || [[word:wavalakal|wavalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wavalathatha|wavalathatha]] || [[word:wavalajaja|wavalajaja]] || [[word:wavalashasha|wavalashasha]] || [[word:wavalaka|wavalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wavalathan|wavalathan]] || [[word:wavalajan|wavalajan]] || [[word:wavalashan|wavalashan]] || [[word:wavalakan|wavalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wavalathaoro|wavalathaoro]] || [[word:wavalajaoro|wavalajaoro]] || [[word:wavalashaoro|wavalashaoro]] || [[word:wavalakaoro|wavalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
